item.brtfacts.swift_scarf.desc: Provides persistent movement speed when equipped.
item.brtfacts.iron_fist.desc: Greatly increases attack damage when equipped.
item.brtfacts.ender_monocle.desc: Provides night vision and makes nearby entities glow.
item.brtfacts.magma_heart_belt.desc: Provides fire resistance and immunity to freezing.
